headline: Trump Taps Lawyer Who Helped Defend Him as Wall Street’s Top Cop
summary: (Bloomberg) -- President Donald Trump tapped an experienced white-collar lawyer who helped defend him in a hush money case to be US attorney for the Southern District of New York, the federal prosecutor whose office handles many high-profile Wall Street cases.Most Read from BloombergWhy Musk Raced to Take SpaceX Public in the World’s Biggest IPOTrump Eyes Sunday Iran Deal But Tehran Says Still Reviewing TextAnthropic Shuts Down Mythos Access After Sweeping US OrderUS Wants to Avoid Congressional
